description: Use this API to modify the zero sequence data of an existing two-winding transformer in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Zero Sequence Transformer Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = seq_two_winding_data_3(ibus, jbus, ckt, intgar, realar)
python_syntax: ierr = seq_two_winding_data_3(ibus, jbus, ckt, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of from bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number of to bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: intgar
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of ten elements specifying (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

intgar.description: CZ0, leakage impedance data I/O code.
CZG, grounding impedance data I/O code.

realar.description: RG1, grounding resistance at the winding 1 bus for an impedance grounded transformer.
XG1, grounding reactance at the winding 1 bus for an impedance grounded transformer.
R01, zero sequence leakage resistance connected to the winding 1 bus.
X01, zero sequence leakage reactance connected to the winding 1 bus.
RG2, grounding resistance at the winding 2 bus for an impedance grounded transformer.
XG2, grounding reactance at the winding 2 bus for an impedance grounded transformer.
R02, zero sequence leakage resistance connected to the winding 2 bus.
X02, zero sequence leakage reactance connected to the winding 2 bus.

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
circuit identifier may not start with &, * or @
branch exists but it is a non-transformer branch.
CZG is 3 but at least one endpoint bus has no base voltage specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Invalid winding connection code. - Z01 is set to its positive sequence value. - A non-zero value is specified for an impedance that is not used with the specified connection code.. - A value of zero is specified for an impedance that is used with the specified connection code. - Invalid CZ0 or CZG data value. - CZ0 or CZG is not 1 with connection code 1 through 9. - CZG data value is 3 but at least one endpoint bus has no base voltage specified. - Non-zero neutral impedance specified but at least one endpoint bus has no base or nominal voltage specified. - Connection code is 18 through 22 but at least one endpoint bus has no base or nominal voltage specified.
